headline: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Futures Fall As Inflation Concerns And VIX Spike

The key driver is the May consumer price report, where overall US CPI is expected at 4.2% year on year and core inflation near 2.9%, which means the cost of living is still rising faster than the Federal Reserve’s 2%...
